news.headline: PxE Holographic Imaging to unveil new 3D camera at CES 2025 in Rehovot, Israel.
news.summary: An upcoming event in REHOVOT, Israel will see the unveiling of an advanced 3D camera by PxE Holographic Imaging. The next-generation camera is set to make its debut at CES 2025, showcasing cutting-edge technology in the realm of 3D imaging. This development marks a significant step forward in camera innovation and is expected to generate buzz at the event. Attendees can look forward to experiencing the latest in holographic imaging technology, as PxE presents its state-of-the-art product to a global audience.

news.headline: Vandis, Inc achieved Fortinet's Cloud Security Partner Specialization in the Fortinet Engage Partner Program.
news.summary: In Albertson, New York on December 12, 2024, Vandis, Inc revealed its attainment of the Fortinet Cloud Security Partner Specialization within the Fortinet Engage Partner Program. This recognition is exclusively granted to partners meeting specific criteria, showcasing their expertise and commitment in cloud security solutions.

news.headline: Hidden River invests in Seedbox Solution to support growth in agricultural supply chain sector. (CHARACTERS: 94)
news.summary: Hidden River Strategic Capital ("Hidden River") has revealed their investment in Seedbox Solution, a company in the agricultural supply chain sector. The investment is a part of Hidden River's strategy to bolster innovation and expansion in the industry. This move was announced in Radnor, Pennsylvania on December 12, 2024. Seedbox Solution is a full-service provider benefiting from this investment, marking a pivotal moment for both companies.

news.headline: Banking experts predict 13 trends for 2025 including AI advancements in fraud, risk management, and customer experience.
news.summary: In Cary, North Carolina on December 12, 2024, experts from SAS predict that the acceleration of Artificial Intelligence (AI) will lead to significant advancements in various fields such as fraud detection, risk management, and customer experience. Despite ongoing economic challenges, regulatory changes, and rapid technological progress, experts believe that AI will play a crucial role in shaping the year 2025. This technological acceleration is expected to bring key developments and improvements in key areas, showcasing the potential impact of AI in addressing challenges and driving innovation.

news.headline: ECB forecast inflation easing to 2% in 4Q/2025.
ECB forecasts assume 2024 oil price of $81.8/barrel, 2025 $71.80, 2026 $70.10, and 2027 $69.20.
Trump: I have a good relationship with China. I have been talking and discussing things with Xi.
ECB forecasts assume exchange rate of $1.08 in 2024.
ECB forecasts assume exchange rate of $1.06 in 2025, 2026, 2027.
Trump: We will be doing something great with crypto.
Implementation of squeeze-out of MRM underway, aiming to acquire remaining 10% shares.
Covered for drought, yet starving - reports show.
Caregiving stress increases hypertension risk in Black women aged 21-44.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, in New York, a recent analysis revealed a concerning correlation between caregiving stress and a heightened likelihood of developing hypertension in Black women aged 21 to 44. This group already faces a higher prevalence of hypertension compared to women of different racial backgrounds. The study underlines the potential health risks and challenges faced by caregivers in this demographic, emphasizing the need for targeted support and interventions to address this issue.

news.headline: Amar Urhekar appointed CEO of Avalere Health, global strategic partner in healthcare.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, Avalere Health, a global healthcare strategic partner, appointed Amar Urhekar as its new Chief Executive Officer. The company is known for its innovative approach to addressing major challenges in the healthcare industry. This move signals a shift in leadership as Avalere Health continues its mission to revolutionize the sector.

news.headline: Journalist Troy Edgar interviews Dan Walters in special Ameritocracy episode in Sacramento. Dan has over 50 years of experience in journalism and is California's most syndicated columnist.
news.summary: In Sacramento, California on December 12, 2024, the host Troy Edgar featured a new episode of Ameritocracy where he interviewed Dan Walters, a highly respected and widely syndicated columnist in the state. Walters, with a remarkable journalism career spanning over 50 years, discussed various topics of importance.

news.headline: Fujitsu creates first multi-AI agent security tech to prevent cyberattacks through collaboration. #InnovativeSecurityTech
news.summary: A cutting-edge security technology has been developed involving multiple AI agents with expertise in combatting cyber threats. These AI agents collaborate to prevent attacks before they happen and tackle the growing complexity of cybersecurity challenges. This new approach combines the skills and knowledge of various AI agents specialized in security, enhancing defense mechanisms against potential threats. The technology aims to improve protection against cyberattacks, emphasizing proactive measures and leveraging collaboration among AI agents with diverse capabilities.

news.headline: Synechron opens new delivery center in Toronto, Canada on Dec 12, 2024, to enhance client services.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, Synechron, Inc., a prominent digital transformation consulting firm, revealed the launch of a new delivery center in Toronto, Canada. This expansion showcases Synechron's dedication to catering to client requirements as the company progresses.

news.headline: McLane teammates and partners raise $1 million for local and national organizations in 2024.
news.summary: In Temple, Texas, McLane employees and collaborators have successfully gathered more than $1 million to benefit local and national nonprofit organizations throughout the year 2024.

news.headline: RainFocus ranked as Leader in All-In-One Event Management Platforms by independent research, excelling in delivering complex events.
news.summary: A recent report has named RainFocus as a top vendor, highlighting its exceptional performance in delivering tier-one events, as well as its capacity to handle tier-two and tier-three events. The company, based in LEHI, Utah, received praise for its unparalleled ability in event management. The recognition was announced on Dec. 11, 2024.

news.headline: ECB's President Lagarde: Will debate neutral rate more as we get closer to it.
ECB's President Lagarde: The neutral rate probably a little higher than before.
Study by 360insights finds auto aftermarket digital divide as dealers dominate market, with disconnect in channel programs.
news.summary: In New Orleans, a recent study by 360insights, a prominent channel incentive management solutions provider, identified a significant gap in communication between automotive manufacturers' channel programs and their dealer networks. Despite the majority of dealers expressing confidence in the potential for these programs to enhance business performance, the study of over 200 industry leaders in the U.S., including dealers, owners, and technicians from the auto and auto aftermarket sectors, uncovered a clear misalignment. This suggests that there is a critical need for improved collaboration and understanding between manufacturers and dealers in order to capitalize on these opportunities for growth.

news.headline: Warner Bros. Discovery separates cable and streaming assets for business division.
Schneider Electric named Official Sustainability Partner of Boston Marathon, covering all B.A.A. events.
news.summary: In Mississauga, Ontario, it was reported today that the Boston Athletic Association has chosen Schneider Electric as the Official Sustainability Partner for all B.A.A. events. This partnership is expected to have a significant impact on the environmental efforts of the association and its events. This collaboration signifies a major step towards promoting sustainability in the world of athletics, with Schneider Electric playing a pivotal role in this initiative. The specific details of the partnership, including the duration and scope, were not disclosed in the announcement.

news.headline: Omdia: Consumer VR market declines as headset sales fall by 10% to 6.9 million units in 2024, down from 7.7 million in 2023.
news.summary: According to recent research from Omdia, the consumer virtual reality (VR) sector in 2024 faced a ongoing decrease. Sales of VR headsets dropped by 10% during the year to 6.9 million units, down from the previous year's 7.7 million. The market is predicted to experience a further decline in 2025, following the same trend.

news.headline: Independent Life employees volunteered at LATLC "Comfort and Joy" event, supporting 500+ families in need.
news.summary: More than 500 families in need from Los Angeles received essential support and holiday joy at the "Comfort and Joy" event organized by the Los Angeles Trial Lawyers Charities (LATLC). Volunteer efforts from Independent Life employees in Jacksonville, Florida were crucial in making the event possible. Taking place on December 12, 2024, this annual event not only provided crucial assistance to over 500 families but also spread festive cheer to those experiencing hardship during the holiday season.

news.headline: ECB's President Lagarde: ECB attentive to impact from exchange rate.
Westhaven Gold Corp. reports final drill results at Certes target and 2024 campaign at Shovelnose gold property in BC.
news.summary: Westhaven Gold Corp. has shared the latest drill findings from the Certes target and given an overview of their exploration ventures in 2024 at the Shovelnose gold property located in the Spences Bridge Gold Belt. This property spans 41,634 hectares and is positioned 30 kilometers south of Merritt, British Columbia. The company, listed on the TSX-V as WHN, disclosed these details on December 12, 2024, emphasizing the significant exploration activities undertaken throughout the year.

news.headline: SEER partners with DevvStream to monetize insured carbon credits from methane renewable energy and oil field emissions, committing to aggressive decarbonization.
news.summary: SEER has announced a bold initiative to reduce carbon emissions and generate revenue from carbon credits. The company will focus on decarbonization efforts for its MV Technology solutions and upcoming biocarbon production sites, both within the country and internationally.

news.headline: Cannara Biotech's CFO to host investor webcast on Dec 19, 2024, presenting key financial and operational results.
news.summary: The Chief Financial Officer, Nicholas Sosiak, is set to deliver a presentation detailing significant financial and operational outcomes for the financial year concluding on August 31, 2024.

news.headline: Elektrobit unveils SDV roadmap at CES 2025, launching open-source solutions from cloud to cockpit.
news.summary: A company based in Erlangen, Germany known as Elektrobit has revealed plans to present an extended range of open-source and virtual software development solutions. The announcement was made on December 12, 2024. Elektrobit also intends to introduce the industry's blueprint for the software-defined vehicle during the showcase. This event will offer a glimpse into the latest advancements in the field, highlighting the company's commitment to innovation.

news.headline: Evinced raises $55M in Series C funding to lead in AI-driven digital accessibility for Global 500 corps.
news.summary: Evinced, a prominent software company focusing on accessibility, has seen an increase in adoption by additional Global 500 corporations. Headquartered in PALO ALTO, Calif., the company revealed on December 12, 2024, its successful fundraising of $55 million. Evinced's strategy prioritizes prevention through software, particularly for enhancing web and mobile development to make them more accessible.

news.headline: HiBy launches R6 Pro MAX DAP with dual ESS9039SM Pro DAC chips for superior audio quality.
news.summary: In Lewes, Delaware, on December 12, 2024, HiBy, a prominent player in the portable audio sector, revealed the debut of its latest product - the R6 Pro MAX Digital Audio Player (DAP). This cutting-edge DAP is integrated with a pair of top-notch DAC chips (specifically, two ESS9039SM Pro), ensuring exceptional audio quality.

news.headline: Kazakh activists create 'Save the Caspian Sea' movement to address ecological crisis; seeks intl support.
news.summary: In Almaty, Kazakhstan on December 12, 2024, a group consisting of Kazakh environmental activists, scientists, and thought leaders are urging the global community to take action regarding the worsening ecological situation in the Caspian Sea. They have introduced a new worldwide initiative called Save the Caspian Sea.

news.headline: Michael Sonnenshein named COO at Securitize, a leading tokenization platform. He will bridge traditional finance & blockchain tech.
news.summary: In a move aimed at uniting traditional finance with blockchain technology, Securitize, a prominent tokenization platform, announced on December 12, 2024, the appointment of Michael Sonnenshein as their new leader. Sonnenshein, previously the CEO of Grayscale, a pioneer in digital asset investing, will now spearhead efforts to expand tokenization strategies. This strategic decision is expected to accelerate the adoption of on-chain solutions worldwide.

news.headline: Accounting Seed releases guides to aid SMBs with data accuracy for automation and AI; resources focus on Salesforce Platform.
news.summary: A recent release from Accounting Seed, a leading accounting software on the Salesforce Platform, emphasizes the critical role of data accuracy in facilitating automation and AI. The resources, unveiled on Dec. 12, 2024, include a set of informative guides aimed at equipping businesses with essential tools for optimal performance. This initiative underscores the key importance of ensuring precise data for successful implementation of automated processes and artificial intelligence technologies.

news.headline: Detroit Lions GM Brad Holmes to speak at Automate 2025 on creating a winning culture. DETROIT, Dec. 12, 2024.
news.summary: In Detroit on December 12, 2024, Brad Holmes, the executive vice president and general manager of the Detroit Lions, is set to discuss organizational transformation and building a successful culture with Miller. The event is hosted by the Association for Advancing Automation (A3) and aims to delve into strategies for change and growth within organizations. This initiative emphasizes the importance of establishing a strong foundation for success in today's dynamic business landscape.

news.headline: Saudi Arabia's commercial vehicle market projected till 2035 features Daimler, Mitsubishi Fuso, Hino, Isuzu, Scania, and SinoTruk. Vision 2030's tech emphasis detailed.
news.summary: An analysis report titled "Saudi Arabia Commercial Vehicle Market, 2024-2035" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The report delves into Vision 2030's focus on modern technologies such as automation, IoT, and data analytics to improve logistics efficiency and service standards. It examines the Vision 2030 objectives established by the Saudi Arabian government, progress made so far, and anticipated future effects. The report forecasts how this dedication is likely to expedite advancements in the commercial vehicle market within Saudi Arabia.

news.headline: MOO Imbalance
Edged Data Centers opens new sustainable facility in Kansas City with 26 MW capacity, zero water cooling.
news.summary: A cutting-edge facility in Kansas City, Missouri, designed to meet the demands of the high-tech market, has been launched by Edged, a sustainable infrastructure provider. With a critical capacity of 26 megawatts, the facility is AI-ready and boasts ultra-efficient operations. Notably, it consumes no water for cooling, making it an environmentally friendly option. This development showcases the company's commitment to meeting the growing needs of the tech industry while prioritizing sustainability. The facility's launch, announced on December 12, 2024, demonstrates the ongoing expansion of sustainable infrastructure solutions in the region.

news.headline: Unemployment claims increase as producer prices rise sharply. Stay updated on the latest reports.
ECB head Lagarde warns of downside growth risks during press conference.
Bollinger Motors' Class 4 electric truck generates $4M in sales, with 25 B4 models delivered and paid for.
news.summary: Since the beginning of production, a total of 25 B4s have been delivered and paid for.

news.headline: ECB's President Lagarde: US tariffs not incorporated into ECB projections.
Ukraine to legalize crypto by 2025 with strict rules, applying standard taxes without incentives.
news.summary: Ukraine is set to legalize cryptocurrencies by the beginning of 2025, subjecting them to regular taxation without any special tax breaks.

news.headline: Hexaware Technologies wins AI Implementer of the Year at AIconics Awards in New York on Dec 12, 2024.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, in Iselin, New Jersey, Hexaware Technologies, a prominent IT solutions and service provider, achieved recognition by winning the AI Implementer of the Year award at the esteemed AIconics Awards. The company is set to be honored at The AI Summit New York on the same date. This signifies a significant accomplishment for Hexaware Technologies in the field of artificial intelligence.

news.headline: Terreno Realty Corporation buys property in Brooklyn, NY for $156.3 million.
news.summary: Real estate investment company Terreno Realty Corporation has recently purchased a property located in Brooklyn, New York for a total of $156.3 million. This acquisition marks a significant move for the corporation as it expands its portfolio in the region. The property is expected to contribute to the company's growth and strategic investment goals in the coming months.
